title: boechera brachycarpa
intro: Boechera brachycarpa, also known as short-pod rockcress, is a species of flowering plant in the mustard family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Boechera brachycarpa are thought to include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and potentially supporting the immune system. Boechera brachycarpa can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible medicinal option.
